title: otiophora scabra subsp. scabra
intro: Otiophora scabra subsp. scabra is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the rough leaf otiothpora. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Otiophora scabra subsp. scabra can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which may be administered orally or topically to harness its potential benefits.
